memos.transcript: Friday review. Sarah: July 7th too risky — docs QA failed two checks. Tunde: Hit Node 18 breaking changes in auth library. July 7th is off the table. Marcus: Go back to July 14th — hold the line. Tunde: Agreed, July 14th. I can finish Node 18 by July 10th. Sarah: Docs QA signed off by July 11th. Marcus: Need QA to sign off on Node 18 regression suite — that is a hard gate.
memos.extraction: {"decisions":[{"text":"v2 launch date restored to July 14th — July 7th target dropped due to docs QA failures and Node 18 breaking changes","made_by":"Full team","date_mentioned":"July 1"},{"text":"Node 18 will be included in v2 — must complete by July 10th with buffer before launch","made_by":"Tunde","date_mentioned":"July 1"},{"text":"QA sign-off on Node 18 regression suite is a hard gate for v2 launch","made_by":"Full team","date_mentioned":"July 1"},{"text":"API docs QA to be signed off by July 11th","made_by":"Sarah","date_mentioned":"July 1"}],"action_items":[{"task":"Complete Node 18 upgrade","owner":"Tunde","deadline":"July 10","status":"closed"},{"task":"Get docs QA signed off","owner":"Sarah","deadline":"July 11","status":"closed"},{"task":"Schedule QA regression run for Node 18","owner":"Marcus","deadline":"Before July 12","status":"closed"}],"open_questions":[{"question":"Has QA been briefed on the Node 18 regression scope?","blocking":true}],"commitments":[{"person":"Tunde","commitment":"Node 18 upgrade complete","deadline":"July 10"},{"person":"Sarah","commitment":"Docs QA sign-off","deadline":"July 11"},{"person":"Marcus","commitment":"QA regression run scheduled","deadline":"Before July 12"}],"flags":[]}

memos.transcript: Tunde: I actually started the Node 18 upgrade this week. I know we said next sprint, but it is going better than expected. Also the CEO wants to move launch to July 7th. Sarah: That is a week earlier than July 14th — docs QA review is not done. Marcus: DB migration done, CDN is live. Tunde: Targeting July 7th, reassess Friday. Sarah: Flagging as risk.
memos.extraction: {"decisions":[{"text":"Targeting July 7th for v2 launch — one week earlier than previously agreed July 14th","made_by":"Tunde (per CEO directive)","date_mentioned":"June 28"},{"text":"Node 18 upgrade re-started — previously deferred to next sprint","made_by":"Tunde","date_mentioned":"June 28"}],"action_items":[{"task":"Reassess launch date on Friday","owner":"Team","deadline":"Friday June 30","status":"open"},{"task":"Complete API docs QA review","owner":"Sarah","deadline":"Before July 7","status":"open"}],"open_questions":[{"question":"Is July 7th realistic given the docs QA backlog?","blocking":true},{"question":"Is Node 18 safe to ship by July 7th?","blocking":true}],"commitments":[{"person":"Tunde","commitment":"Node 18 upgrade before launch","deadline":"July 7"}],"flags":[{"type":"conflict","description":"Launch date conflict: July 14th was decided in the June 24 standup, now being moved to July 7th without formal team alignment","prior_decision":"v2 launch date set to July 14th"},{"type":"conflict","description":"Node 18 contradiction: Tunde committed to Node 16 for v2 on June 24, but has now restarted the Node 18 upgrade targeting the same launch","prior_decision":"Commit to Node 16 for v2 launch — Node 18 migration deferred to next sprint"},{"type":"risk","description":"API documentation QA review not complete — Sarah flagged this as a risk to the July 7th target"}]}

memos.transcript: Good morning team. Quick standup. Tunde: I am pushing the Node 18 migration to next sprint — committing to Node 16 for the v2 launch. Sarah: v2 launches July 14th. I own API docs, done by end of week. Marcus: Backend tests green. I am on the DB migration script, done by June 28th. CDN setup is a blocker — Marcus takes it, done by June 27th.
memos.summary: 3 decisions · 4 action items · Node 16 confirmed for v2
memos.extraction: {"decisions":[{"text":"Commit to Node 16 for v2 launch — Node 18 migration deferred to next sprint","made_by":"Tunde, agreed by team","date_mentioned":"June 24"},{"text":"v2 launch date set to July 14th","made_by":"Sarah","date_mentioned":"June 24"},{"text":"Sarah owns API documentation","made_by":"Sarah","date_mentioned":"June 24"}],"action_items":[{"task":"Push API documentation","owner":"Sarah","deadline":"End of week (June 28)","status":"closed"},{"task":"Complete database migration script","owner":"Marcus","deadline":"June 28","status":"closed"},{"task":"Set up CDN for staging environment","owner":"Marcus","deadline":"June 27","status":"closed"},{"task":"Defer Node 18 migration to next sprint","owner":"Tunde","deadline":"Next sprint planning","status":"open"}],"open_questions":[{"question":"Who handles CDN setup for staging?","blocking":true}],"commitments":[{"person":"Sarah","commitment":"API docs complete","deadline":"End of week (June 28)"},{"person":"Marcus","commitment":"DB migration script complete","deadline":"June 28"},{"person":"Marcus","commitment":"CDN configuration","deadline":"June 27"},{"person":"Tunde","commitment":"Node 16 for v2 launch","deadline":"July 14"}],"flags":[]}
